libraries.name: shadcn/ui
libraries.customizability: HIGH — copy source, edit directly, full control
libraries.style: headless + tailwind, minimal default style, clean
libraries.install: npx shadcn@latest init && npx shadcn@latest add button
libraries.when: Khi cần tùy biến cao, dùng Next.js/React, muốn control source, dashboard/SaaS app
libraries.dont_when: Vue/Svelte project, cần component ngay không muốn custom, project nhỏ

libraries.name: Ant Design
libraries.style: Professional, dense, enterprise Chinese tech aesthetic
libraries.when: Enterprise dashboard, nhiều forms/tables/data, team lớn, B2B SaaS, CRM
libraries.dont_when: Landing page, marketing site, performance-critical mobile, small project

libraries.name: Mantine
libraries.customizability: HIGH — CSS-in-JS (Emotion), full theme provider + overrides
libraries.style: Clean, modern, good default aesthetics, mobile-first
libraries.when: Cần ~100 components sẵn có, hooks mạnh mẽ, React project, forms-heavy, mobile-first
libraries.dont_when: Vue/Svelte, cần nhẹ nhất có thể, project đơn giản

libraries.name: Magic UI
libraries.customizability: MEDIUM — copy source, edit directly, framer-motion based
libraries.motion: EXCELLENT — built-in Framer Motion, stunning transitions
libraries.install: npx magicsync@latest add button (or copy component directly)
libraries.when: Landing page, marketing site, cần hiệu ứng đẹp nhanh, portfolio, showcase
libraries.dont_when: Data-heavy dashboard, enterprise app, cần accessibility cao, form-heavy

libraries.name: DaisyUI
libraries.customizability: MEDIUM — Tailwind utility classes + DaisyUI theme tokens
libraries.install: npm install -D daisyui@latest tailwindcss && npx tailwindcss init
libraries.when: Nhẹ nhất có thể, dùng Tailwind CSS, bất kỳ framework nào, project nhỏ-vừa
libraries.dont_when: Cần nhiều components phức tạp có sẵn (tables, date pickers deep), full enterprise

decision_rules.description: Framework match is the primary filter — if library doesn't support the stack, score 0
